---
title: "3_Annotation"
output: html_document
---


#import 
```{r}
#v21 as placeholder while miRbase is currently down
#mature_db<- readRNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data","miRNA_mature_v21.fa")) #this was 2016 version
mature_db<-readRNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data","20260702mature.fa"))
#import fasta mature
mature_wheat<- readDNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data", "mirdeep2",
  "no_plant_wheat__red__walton_all_mature.fna"))
mature_corn<- readDNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data", "mirdeep2",
  "art__gold__no_plant_corn_all_mature.fna"))
mature_soybean<- readDNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data", "mirdeep2",
  "envy__manitoba__no_plant_soybean_all_mature.fna"))
mature_bean<- readDNAStringSet(file.path("raw_data", "mirdeep2",
  "bognol__no_plant_bean__roq_all_mature.fna"))
#convert DNA sequences to RNA
mature_wheat <- RNAStringSet(mature_wheat) 
mature_corn <- RNAStringSet(mature_corn) 
mature_soybean <- RNAStringSet(mature_soybean) 
mature_bean <- RNAStringSet(mature_bean) 

w_merge_n<-readRDS(file.path("raw_data","RDS","w_merge_norm.rds"))
c_merge_n<-readRDS(file.path("raw_data","RDS","c_merge_norm.rds"))
s_merge_n<-readRDS(file.path("raw_data","RDS","s_merge_norm.rds"))
b_merge_n<-readRDS(file.path("raw_data","RDS","b_merge_norm.rds"))
```

#combine fasta
```{r}
#combine fasta
all_seq <- c(mature_wheat, mature_corn, mature_soybean, mature_bean)
# remove duplicates based on sequence
all_unique <- all_seq[!duplicated(as.character(all_seq))]
writeXStringSet(all_unique, "combined_unique_miRNA.fna")
#remove duplicates of each fasta
mature_corn_u <- mature_corn[!duplicated(as.character(mature_corn))]
mature_wheat_u <- mature_wheat[!duplicated(as.character(mature_wheat))]
mature_soybean_u <- mature_soybean[!duplicated(as.character(mature_soybean))]
mature_bean_u <- mature_bean[!duplicated(as.character(mature_bean))]
#checking duplicate accros sample
length(mature_corn_u)
length(mature_wheat_u)
length(mature_bean_u)
length(mature_soybean_u) 
#total = 85 (separate)
length(all_unique)
#total = 73 (combined), so 12 sequences that are shared
```

#annotation : do not use
```{r}
#This method can match even distant miRNA together. I can therefore match isomiR or undiscorvered miRNA
#especially usefull for plants like common bean who have very few miRNA in miRBase
###wheat###
max_dist <- 3 #IsomiR match setting
#ref_names <- sub(" .*", "", names(mature_all))  # keep just the miRNA ID, drop description
db_names <- names(mature_db)
#ref_names <- sub(" .*", "", names(mature_all))
ref_species <- sub("-.*", "", db_names)
query_species <- "tae" #select species of interset for match priority

hits <- lapply(mature_wheat_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")
  min_d <- min(d)
  tied_idx <- which(d == min_d)                     # ALL best hits, not just the first

  # prefer own-species match among ties
  own_species_hit <- tied_idx[ref_species[tied_idx] == query_species]
  chosen <- if (length(own_species_hit) > 0) own_species_hit[1] else tied_idx[1]

  data.frame(
    match_id      = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch = min_d, #meaning how many nt are not matched
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_idx])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_idx]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_w_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_w_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_wheat_u
mir_w_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_w_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_w_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_w_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_w_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk

###corn###
query_species <- "zma" 
hits <- lapply(mature_corn_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")
  min_d <- min(d)
  tied_idx <- which(d == min_d)                     # ALL best hits, not just the first

  # prefer own-species match among ties
  own_species_hit <- tied_idx[ref_species[tied_idx] == query_species]
  chosen <- if (length(own_species_hit) > 0) own_species_hit[1] else tied_idx[1]

  data.frame(
    match_id      = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch = min_d, #meaning how many nt are not matched
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_idx])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_idx]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_c_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_c_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_corn_u
mir_c_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_c_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_c_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_c_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_c_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk

###soybean###
query_species <- "gma" 
hits <- lapply(mature_soybean_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")
  min_d <- min(d)
  tied_idx <- which(d == min_d)                     # ALL best hits, not just the first

  # prefer own-species match among ties
  own_species_hit <- tied_idx[ref_species[tied_idx] == query_species]
  chosen <- if (length(own_species_hit) > 0) own_species_hit[1] else tied_idx[1]

  data.frame(
    match_id      = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch = min_d, #meaning how many nt are not matched
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_idx])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_idx]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_s_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_s_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_soybean_u
mir_s_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_s_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_s_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_s_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_s_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk


###common bean###
query_species <- "pvu" 
hits <- lapply(mature_bean_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")
  min_d <- min(d)
  tied_idx <- which(d == min_d)                     # ALL best hits, not just the first

  # prefer own-species match among ties
  own_species_hit <- tied_idx[ref_species[tied_idx] == query_species]
  chosen <- if (length(own_species_hit) > 0) own_species_hit[1] else tied_idx[1]

  data.frame(
    match_id      = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch = min_d, #meaning how many nt are not matched
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_idx])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_idx]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_b_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_b_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_bean_u
mir_b_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_b_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_b_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_b_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_b_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk


```

#new version, priority to isomiR of same sp
```{r}
#This method can match even distant miRNA together. I can therefore match isomiR or undiscorvered miRNA
#especially usefull for plants like common bean who have very few miRNA in miRBase
###wheat###
max_dist <- 3 #IsomiR match setting
#ref_names <- sub(" .*", "", names(mature_all))  # keep just the miRNA ID, drop description
db_names <- names(mature_db)
#ref_names <- sub(" .*", "", names(mature_all))
ref_species <- sub("-.*", "", db_names)
query_species <- "tae" #select species of interset for match priority
hits <- lapply(mature_wheat_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")

  own_idx   <- which(ref_species == query_species)
  own_min_d <- if (length(own_idx) > 0) min(d[own_idx]) else Inf

  if (own_min_d <= max_dist) {
    # own species has an acceptable match (exact or isomiR) -> use it, even if not global best
    tied_idx <- own_idx[d[own_idx] == own_min_d]
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- own_min_d
  } else {
    # own species has nothing close enough -> fall back to best homolog anywhere
    global_min_d <- min(d)
    tied_idx <- which(d == global_min_d)
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- global_min_d
  }

  # species that are tied at whatever distance was actually chosen
  tied_at_chosen <- which(d == chosen_d)

  data.frame(
    match_id       = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch       = chosen_d,
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_w_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_w_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_wheat_u
mir_w_a$species   <- sub("-.*", "", mir_w_a$match_id)
mir_w_a$call_type <- ifelse(mir_w_a$mismatch == 0, "exact",
                     ifelse(mir_w_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched"))

###corn###
query_species <- "zma" 

hits <- lapply(mature_corn_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")

  own_idx   <- which(ref_species == query_species)
  own_min_d <- if (length(own_idx) > 0) min(d[own_idx]) else Inf

  if (own_min_d <= max_dist) {
    # own species has an acceptable match (exact or isomiR) -> use it, even if not global best
    tied_idx <- own_idx[d[own_idx] == own_min_d]
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- own_min_d
  } else {
    # own species has nothing close enough -> fall back to best homolog anywhere
    global_min_d <- min(d)
    tied_idx <- which(d == global_min_d)
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- global_min_d
  }

  # species that are tied at whatever distance was actually chosen
  tied_at_chosen <- which(d == chosen_d)

  data.frame(
    match_id       = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch       = chosen_d,
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_c_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_c_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_corn_u
mir_c_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_c_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_c_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_c_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_c_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk

###soybean###
query_species <- "gma" 
hits <- lapply(mature_soybean_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")

  own_idx   <- which(ref_species == query_species)
  own_min_d <- if (length(own_idx) > 0) min(d[own_idx]) else Inf

  if (own_min_d <= max_dist) {
    # own species has an acceptable match (exact or isomiR) -> use it, even if not global best
    tied_idx <- own_idx[d[own_idx] == own_min_d]
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- own_min_d
  } else {
    # own species has nothing close enough -> fall back to best homolog anywhere
    global_min_d <- min(d)
    tied_idx <- which(d == global_min_d)
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- global_min_d
  }

  # species that are tied at whatever distance was actually chosen
  tied_at_chosen <- which(d == chosen_d)

  data.frame(
    match_id       = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch       = chosen_d,
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_s_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_s_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_soybean_u
mir_s_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_s_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_s_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_s_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_s_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk

###common bean###
query_species <- "pvu" 
hits <- lapply(mature_bean_u, function(q) {
  d <- stringdist(q, mature_db, method = "lv")

  own_idx   <- which(ref_species == query_species)
  own_min_d <- if (length(own_idx) > 0) min(d[own_idx]) else Inf

  if (own_min_d <= max_dist) {
    # own species has an acceptable match (exact or isomiR) -> use it, even if not global best
    tied_idx <- own_idx[d[own_idx] == own_min_d]
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- own_min_d
  } else {
    # own species has nothing close enough -> fall back to best homolog anywhere
    global_min_d <- min(d)
    tied_idx <- which(d == global_min_d)
    chosen   <- tied_idx[1]
    chosen_d <- global_min_d
  }

  # species that are tied at whatever distance was actually chosen
  tied_at_chosen <- which(d == chosen_d)

  data.frame(
    match_id       = db_names[chosen],
    mismatch       = chosen_d,
    n_tied_species = length(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen])),
    tied_species   = paste(unique(ref_species[tied_at_chosen]), collapse = ",")
  )
})
mir_b_a <- do.call(rbind, hits)
mir_b_a$mature_miRNA <- mature_bean_u
mir_b_a$species    <- sub("-.*", "", mir_b_a$match_id)          # which species the match came from
mir_b_a$call_type  <- ifelse(mir_b_a$mismatch == 0, "exact", 
                      ifelse(mir_b_a$mismatch <= max_dist, "isomiR/homolog", "unmatched")) #unmatched = junk

```

#add annotation to main df
```{r}
mir_w_a$mature_miRNA   <- as.character(mir_w_a$mature_miRNA)
wheat_miR_ann <- merge(w_merge_n,mir_w_a, by = 'mature_miRNA')

mir_c_a$mature_miRNA   <- as.character(mir_c_a$mature_miRNA)
corn_miR_ann <- merge(c_merge_n,mir_c_a, by = 'mature_miRNA')

mir_s_a$mature_miRNA   <- as.character(mir_s_a$mature_miRNA)
soybean_miR_ann <- merge(s_merge_n,mir_s_a, by = 'mature_miRNA')

mir_b_a$mature_miRNA   <- as.character(mir_b_a$mature_miRNA)
bean_miR_ann <- merge(b_merge_n,mir_b_a, by = 'mature_miRNA') 

### clean up df ###

#wheat
wheat_miR_ann <- wheat_miR_ann %>%  mutate(mir_id = word(match_id, 1),accession = word(match_id, 2)) #new cols
species_map <- c(wheat = "tae", corn = "zma", soybean = "gma", bean = "pvu")
wheat_miR_ann <- wheat_miR_ann %>% #add distiction for miR homologs or/and isomiR
  mutate(
    match_prefix = sub("-.*", "", mir_id),

    own_prefix = case_when(
      Sp %in% c("wheat", "ctl") ~ species_map["wheat"],
      Sp %in% names(species_map) ~ unname(species_map[Sp]),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    mir_id = case_when(
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ mir_id,
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("iso-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ paste0("ho-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("ho-iso-", mir_id),
      TRUE ~ mir_id
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-own_prefix, -match_prefix)
wheat_miR_ann$mir_id[wheat_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- "unknown miR/junk" #rename
wheat_miR_ann$accession[wheat_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- NA
wheat_miR_ann <- wheat_miR_ann[, -c(9,11:13)] 

#corn
corn_miR_ann <- corn_miR_ann %>%  mutate(mir_id = word(match_id, 1),accession = word(match_id, 2)) #new cols
corn_miR_ann <- corn_miR_ann %>% #add distiction for miR homologs or/and isomiR
  mutate(
    match_prefix = sub("-.*", "", mir_id),

    own_prefix = case_when(
      Sp %in% c("corn", "ctl") ~ species_map["corn"],
      Sp %in% names(species_map) ~ unname(species_map[Sp]),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    mir_id = case_when(
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ mir_id,
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("iso-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ paste0("ho-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("ho-iso-", mir_id),
      TRUE ~ mir_id
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-own_prefix, -match_prefix)
corn_miR_ann$mir_id[corn_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- "unknown miR/junk" #rename
corn_miR_ann$accession[corn_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- NA
corn_miR_ann <- corn_miR_ann[, -c(9,11:13)] 

#soybean
soybean_miR_ann <- soybean_miR_ann %>%  mutate(mir_id = word(match_id, 1),accession = word(match_id, 2)) #new cols
soybean_miR_ann <- soybean_miR_ann %>% #add distiction for miR homologs or/and isomiR
  mutate(
    match_prefix = sub("-.*", "", mir_id),

    own_prefix = case_when(
      Sp %in% c("soybean", "ctl") ~ species_map["soybean"],
      Sp %in% names(species_map) ~ unname(species_map[Sp]),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    mir_id = case_when(
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ mir_id,
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("iso-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ paste0("ho-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("ho-iso-", mir_id),
      TRUE ~ mir_id
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-own_prefix, -match_prefix)
soybean_miR_ann$mir_id[soybean_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- "unknown miR/junk" #rename
soybean_miR_ann$accession[soybean_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- NA
soybean_miR_ann <- soybean_miR_ann[, -c(9,11:13)] 


#bean
bean_miR_ann <- bean_miR_ann %>%  mutate(mir_id = word(match_id, 1),accession = word(match_id, 2)) #new cols
bean_miR_ann <- bean_miR_ann %>% #add distiction for miR homologs or/and isomiR
  mutate(
    match_prefix = sub("-.*", "", mir_id),

    own_prefix = case_when(
      Sp %in% c("bean", "ctl") ~ species_map["bean"],
      Sp %in% names(species_map) ~ unname(species_map[Sp]),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    mir_id = case_when(
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ mir_id,
      match_prefix == own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("iso-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch == 0 ~ paste0("ho-", mir_id),
      match_prefix != own_prefix & mismatch > 0  ~ paste0("ho-iso-", mir_id),
      TRUE ~ mir_id
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-own_prefix, -match_prefix)
bean_miR_ann$mir_id[bean_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- "unknown miR/junk" #rename
bean_miR_ann$accession[bean_miR_ann$call_type == "unmatched"] <- NA
bean_miR_ann <- bean_miR_ann[, -c(9,11:13)] 
```

#saving df with annotation
```{r}
saveRDS(wheat_miR_ann, file = here("raw_data","RDS","wheat_annota.rds"))  
saveRDS(corn_miR_ann, file = here("raw_data","RDS","corn_annota.rds"))  
saveRDS(soybean_miR_ann, file = here("raw_data","RDS","soybean_annota.rds"))  
saveRDS(bean_miR_ann, file = here("raw_data","RDS","bean_annota.rds"))  
```
